text: ظآزOver, under, against, on, over, under, against, onظآز
ظآزKeep on listening to this song about over, under, against, onظآز
ظآزThe frog is "over" the log  just like the log is "under" the frogظآز
ظآزNow the frog is "against" the logظآز
ظآزNow the frog is "on" the logظآز
ظآزI think we should sing it again, but this time you should sing with meظآز
ظآزThe frog is "over" the log just like the log is "under" the frogظآز
ظآزNow the frog is "against" the logظآز
ظآزNow the frog is "on" the logظآز
ظآزFar from, near, next to, among, far from, near, next to, amongظآز
ظآزKeep on listening to this song about far from, near, next to, amongظآز
ظآزThe goose is "far from" the mooseظآز
The goose is "near" the mooseظآز
ظآزAnd now the goose is "next to" the mooseظآز
ظآزAnd now the goose is "among" the mooseظآز
ظآزI want to hear it again, I want to hear you do it with meظآز
ظآزThe goose is "far from" the mooseظآز
ظآزThe goose is "near" the mooseظآز
ظآزAnd now the goose is "next to" the mooseظآز
ظآزAnd now the goose is "among" the mooseظآز
ظآزI like singin' with you, let's reviewظآز
ظآزOverظآز
ظآزUnderظآز
ظآزAgainstظآز
ظآزOnظآز
ظآزFar fromظآز
ظآزNearظآز
ظآزNext toظآز
ظآزAmongظآز
